Workflows

Use status/spin for orientation, records for durable knowledge, render/site for output, and closeout for reviewable end-of-work packets.

Home / Articles
ArticleFor everyone workflowinstructionsmaintenance

Summary

Use status/spin for orientation, records for durable knowledge, render/site for output, and closeout for reviewable end-of-work packets.

Article

A normal Wikiwiki loop starts with wk status --json and wk spin --profile mixed --json. status reports the store, generated outputs, git changes, and integration state; spin turns current repo context into a deterministic first-pass wiki recipe.

Capture durable public knowledge as article records. Use concepts, decisions, notes, events, symbols, and links as supporting evidence, maintainer context, and source anchors. Prefer CLI record commands over editing .wikiwiki/records/*.jsonl by hand.

When records or human-facing wiki output changes, run wk validate, wk render, and wk site --audience all. Generated files in wiki/ and wiki-site/ should be regenerated from records, not manually edited.

After meaningful work, run wk closeout --profile mixed --audience all --json, review the closeout packet under .wikiwiki/drafts/closeout/, and apply only drafts that are true, useful, and properly sourced.

Categories

workflows maintenance instructions

Aliases

daily workflow agent workflow
